sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives often signals a potential divestiture or sale, which typically creates positive sentiment regarding capital allocation and shareholder value.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
